meanings.example: I have over 10 years of AML experience.
meanings.exampleKo: 저는 10년 이상의 AML 경력을 가지고 있습니다.

meanings.example: We have a few suspicious transactions to review.
meanings.exampleKo: 검토해야 할 의심거래가 몇 건 있습니다.

meanings.example: I had the report reviewed by the legal team.

chunks.example: We have to file the STR within 24 hours.
I had the document translated by a professional.
Only the AML team has access to this database.
Could you have a look at this transaction pattern?
The new regulation will have a major impact on PG companies.

pronTip.title: HAVE 동사 발음 핵심
points: have [해브] — v 소리 입술 가볍게 (밸브가 아니라)
축약형 자주 사용: I've, you've, he's (= he has), we've
have to → [해프 투] — v가 무성음 t 만나면 f 소리로!
has to → [해스 투] — z가 무성음 t 만나면 s 소리로!

listening.title: AML 컴플라이언스 회의 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: We have a flagged transaction from yesterday. Have you had a look at it yet? Staff: Yes, I have. We have to file an STR by tomorrow. Manager: Do you have access to the merchant's KYC file? Staff: I do. I'll have it reviewed by the legal team. Manager: Good. This case will have a big impact on our quarterly report.

blanks.suffix: access to the merchant's KYC file?
it reviewed by the legal team.
a big impact on our quarterly report.

examples5.label: 소유
examples5.en: I have a meeting with the legal team this afternoon.

examples5.label: 의무
examples5.en: We have to update the KYC database every quarter.

examples5.label: 접근권한
examples5.en: Only senior officers have access to high-risk merchant data.
examples5.ko: 시니어 담당자만 고위험 가맹점 데이터에 접근할 수 있어요.

examples5.label: 검토요청
examples5.en: Could you have a look at this STR draft before I submit it?
examples5.ko: 제출하기 전에 이 STR 초안을 한번 봐주실 수 있나요?

examples5.label: 영향
examples5.en: This new FATF guideline will have a huge impact on our process.
examples5.ko: 이번 FATF 가이드라인이 우리 프로세스에 큰 영향을 미칠 거예요.

writing5.ko: 저는 AML 분야에서 10년 이상의 경력이 있습니다.
writing5.en: I have over 10 years of experience in the AML field.

writing5.ko: 검토해야 할 의심거래가 몇 건 있습니다.
writing5.en: We have a few suspicious transactions to review.
We have to file the STR within 24 hours.
I had the document translated by a professional.

writing5.ko: AML 팀만 이 데이터베이스에 접근할 수 있습니다.
writing5.en: Only the AML team has access to this database.

challenge3sec.en: I have a compliance meeting this afternoon.
I have to submit the report by today.
Could you have a look at this transaction pattern?

challenge3sec.ko: 저는 이 시스템에 접근 권한이 있어요.
challenge3sec.en: I have access to this system.
I had the document reviewed by the legal team.

challenge3sec.ko: 이 규정이 큰 영향을 미칠 거예요.
challenge3sec.en: This regulation will have a big impact.
We have to hire more staff.

freewrite.situation: 본인의 부서에서 새로 도입된 AML 규정이 업무에 미친 영향에 대해 영어로 설명하세요. 어떤 변화가 있었고, 무엇을 해야 하며, 어떤 권한·책임이 있는지 HAVE 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: have to, have access to, have a look at, have an impact on
freewrite.placeholder: 예: The new FATF guideline has had a significant impact on our team. We have to review every high-risk merchant within 7 days...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
업무 분배, 권한 확인, 작업 지시 — HAVE 동사가 가장 활발하게 쓰이는 상황!

dialog.text: Do you have time to review this case today?
Yes, I have about an hour after lunch. I'll have a look at it.
Great. We have to finalize it by Friday.
Do you have access to the merchant blacklist?
Yes, I do. Why, do you have a question?
Could you have a look at this merchant code for me?
We have three priority cases this week. The first one will have a big impact on Q2 numbers.
Do we have to file STRs for all three?
Two of them, yes. The third one I'll have reviewed by legal first.
Got it. Do we have access to the historical data?
I have access, and I'll share the folder with the team.
Perfect. We'll have a draft ready by Wednesday.

rolePlay.scenario: 본부장과 1:1 미팅에서 이번 분기 AML 업무 진행 상황을 보고하세요. 진행 중인 케이스, 필요한 리소스, 외부 영향을 HAVE 동사로 설명하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Good morning. I'd like a quick update on the AML team's progress this quarter. What do we have on the table right now, and is there anything you need from me?

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
자료 요청, 검토 부탁, 권한 문의 — 격식 갖춘 HAVE 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Hi, do you have the latest CDD template? I have a new merchant onboarding tomorrow.
Yes, I have it. I'll send it over now.
Thanks! Could you also have a look at my draft once it's ready?
Hi, I have attached the STR draft. Could you have a look when you have time?
Sure, I'll have it reviewed by tomorrow morning.
Much appreciated. We have to submit by Friday EOD.
Our client has a question about your KYC access controls. Who has access to the customer database?
Thanks for reaching out. We have a tiered access model — only the AML team has access to high-risk merchant data.
All access is logged, and we have audit reports reviewed quarterly by an external auditor.
Does the recent FATF update have an impact on this structure?
Yes, it does. We have to add an extra layer of approval for cross-border transactions.
Understood. Could we have a follow-up call next week?

rolePlay.scenario: 외국계 PG사 컴플라이언스 담당자가 한국 PG사의 KYC 접근 권한 정책에 대해 문의 이메일을 보냈습니다. 정중하고 명확하게 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: David, Compliance Lead at a US-based PG company
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, I'm David from PaymentTech US. We have a partnership project on the table and I have a few questions about your access control model. Specifically, who has access to merchant KYC data, and how do you handle cross-border requests?

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
STR 제출, 사역 검토, 접근 통제, 규제 영향 — HAVE 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: We have a high-risk transaction from merchant #2024-815. We have to file an STR.
Have you had a look at the merchant's history?
Yes, I have. They have three previous flags.
Who has access to this customer's full KYC profile?
Only the AML team has full access. Sales has limited view only.
Good. Have all access logs reviewed by next Monday.
We have a few follow-up questions on case #2026-0419. Have you had the chance to gather additional evidence?
Yes, we have. I had the transaction logs analyzed by our data team last week.
Does this case have any cross-border component?
It does. Three transactions have an offshore counterparty. We have to escalate to international cooperation.
Who has access to the offshore counterparty data?
Only myself and the head of compliance. We've had the access list updated this quarter.
Excellent. This case will have a significant impact on our typology study.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU에서 본인이 제출한 STR 케이스의 후속 인터뷰 요청이 왔습니다. 케이스의 권한 통제, 검토 과정, 외부 영향에 대해 HAVE 동사를 활용해 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Thank you for joining. We have reviewed the STR you filed and have a few process questions. First, who in your team has access to the underlying transaction data, and have you had the case reviewed by anyone outside your immediate team?

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
경력 소개, 권한·역할 설명, 업계 영향 토론 — 부드러운 HAVE 동사!

dialog.text: How long have you been in AML?
I have about 10 years of experience, mostly in the PG sector.
Oh nice, you must have seen a lot of changes.
Have you had a chance to attend the keynote this morning?
I have. It was great. The speaker had some sharp insights.
Same here. Do you have time for a coffee after lunch?
Has the recent FATF update had much impact in Korea?
It has, yes. PG companies have to adjust their merchant onboarding process significantly.
Interesting. Do Korean PGs have access to a shared blacklist like we do in Singapore?
Not yet — each company has its own. But we have a working group discussing a shared model.
I'd love to have a deeper chat about that. Do you have time tomorrow?
Sure, I'll have my calendar checked and send you a slot.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스 네트워킹 이벤트에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 담당자와 업계 동향에 대해 자연스럽게 대화하세요. 본인 경력, 권한 구조, 규제 영향을 HAVE 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Marcus, AML Director at a European fintech
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi! Marcus from Berlin. I noticed you're from a Korean PG. We have a partnership inquiry from a Korean firm on our desk and I have zero context on the local AML landscape. Mind if I pick your brain for a few minutes?

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
약속, 일정, 가족 — 가장 친숙한 HAVE 동사 패턴 익히기!

dialog.text: Do you have any plans this weekend?
I have a family dinner on Saturday. I have to prepare the food.
Sounds nice! Have a great time.
Have you had lunch yet?
Not yet. I have a meeting in 10 minutes — I'll grab something after.
You have to take care of yourself!
How's the new baby?
We have so much to do! I have to wake up every 3 hours.
That's tough. Do you have help from family?
My parents have been helping a lot. I had the nursery painted last weekend.
Nice! Has becoming a dad had a big impact on your work?
Definitely. I have to be more efficient with my time now.

rolePlay.scenario: 오랜만에 만난 외국인 친구와 근황을 나누는 자리입니다. 최근 업무, 가족 변화, 일상 루틴을 HAVE 동사로 자연스럽게 설명하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Sophie, an old friend from a study abroad program
rolePlay.aiOpening: Oh my god, it's been forever! How have you been? Last I heard you had just started at the new PG company — and didn't you also have a baby on the way? Tell me everything!
